title: 10 best herbal essential oils for baldness
description: Salvia officinalis, also known as sage, essential oils helps with baldness because of its rich antioxidant properties and anti-inflammatory compounds. It promotes hair growth by stimulating blood flow to the scalp, reducing dandruff and other scalp irritations. The essential oils also help to improve hair follicle health, reducing the risk of hair loss due to stress and hormonal imbalances.
